label: 4713 Incentives for depository institution participation

children.label: A
children.text: the Federal banking agencies (as defined in section 3 of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act []) and the National Credit Union Administration;12 U.S.C. 1813

children.label: B
children.text: the individuals named pursuant to clauses (ii) and (iv) of ; andsection 4703(d)(2)(G) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: any other representatives of insured depository institutions or other persons as the Administrator may determine to be appropriate.

children.heading: Applicability of Bank Enterprise Act of 1991
children.label: 2 Applicability of Bank Enterprise Act of 1991
A
children.text: section 233 of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 [] shall be applicable to the Administrator, for purposes of this section, in the same manner and to the same extent that such section is applicable to the Community Enterprise Assessment Credit Board;12 U.S.C. 1834a

children.label: i
children.text: have all powers and rights of the Community Enterprise Assessment Credit Board under section 233 of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 to administer and enforce any provision of such section 233 which is applicable to the Administrator under this section; and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall be subject to the same duties and restrictions imposed on the Community Enterprise Assessment Credit Board; and

children.label: i
children.text: have all powers and rights of an appropriate Federal banking agency under section 233(b)(2) of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 [] to approve or disapprove the designation of qualified distressed communities for purposes of this section and provide information and assistance with respect to any such designation; and12 U.S.C. 1834a(b)(2)

children.label: ii
children.text: shall be subject to the same duties imposed on the appropriate Federal banking agencies under such section 233(b)(2).

children.heading: Awards
children.label: 3 Awards
children.text: The Administrator shall determine the amount of assessment credits, and shall make awards of those credits.

children.heading: Regulations and guidelines
children.label: 4 Regulations and guidelines
children.text: The Administrator may prescribe such regulations and issue such guidelines as the Administrator determines to be appropriate to carry out this section.

children.heading: Exceptions to applicability
children.label: 5 Exceptions to applicability
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraphs (1) through (4) of this subsection, subsections (a)(1) and (e)(2) of section 233 of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 [, (e)(2)], and any other provision of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act [ et seq.] relating to the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991, do not apply to the Administrator for purposes of this subchapter.12 U.S.C. 1834a(a)(1)12 U.S.C. 1811

children.heading: Provisions relating to administration of this section
children.label: b Provisions relating to administration of this section

children.heading: New lifeline accounts
children.label: 1 New lifeline accounts
children.text: In applying section 233 of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 [] for purposes of this section, the Administrator shall treat the provision of new lifeline accounts by an insured depository institution as an activity which is qualified to be taken into account under section 233(a)(2)(A) of such Act.12 U.S.C. 1834a

children.heading: Determination of assessment credit
children.label: 2 Determination of assessment credit
children.text: For the purpose of this subchapter, section 233(a)(3) of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 () shall be applied by substituting the following text:12 U.S.C. 1834a(a)(3)

children.label: i
children.text: 5 percent of the sum of the amounts determined under such subparagraph, in the case of an institution which is not a community development financial institution; or

children.label: ii
children.text: 15 percent of the sum of the amounts determined under such subparagraph, in the case of an institution which is a community development financial institution; and

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to qualifying activities described in paragraph (2)(C), 15 percent of the amounts determined under such subparagraph.”

children.label: A
children.text: substituting “institutions which are community development financial institutions” for “institutions which meet the community development organization requirements under section 234 []”; and12 U.S.C. 1834b

children.label: B
children.text: substituting “institutions which are not community development financial institutions” for “institutions which do not meet such requirements”.

children.heading: Designation of QDC
children.label: 4 Designation of QDC
children.text: Section 233(b)(2) of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 [] shall be applied for purposes of this section without regard to subparagraph (A)(ii) of such section 233(b)(2).12 U.S.C. 1834a(b)(2)

children.heading: Operation on annual basis
children.label: 5 Operation on annual basis
children.text: The Administrator may, in the Administrator’s discretion, apply section 233 of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 for purposes of this section by providing community enterprise assessment credits with respect to annual periods rather than semiannual periods.

children.heading: Outreach
children.label: 6 Outreach
children.text: The Administrator shall ensure that information about the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 under this section is widely disseminated to all interested parties.

children.heading: Qualified activities
children.label: 7 Qualified activities
children.text: For the purpose of this subchapter, section 233(a)(2)(A) of the Bank Enterprise Act of 1991 shall be applied by inserting “of the increase” after “the amount”.
